purpose: Forward-only post-merge remediation: move public organization intake authority outside Prisma-managed public schema while preserving rollback-compatible public wrappers.
forbiddenCapabilities: creating Organization User membership role or tenant authority
weakening RLS audit outbox consent idempotency or rate limits
changing packages lockfiles Caddy deployment topology or production secrets
acceptance: forward-only migration moves the table into organization_intake schema
old public functions remain compatibility wrappers
new runtime uses schema-qualified EXECUTE-only functions
Prisma drift and restricted-principal E2E pass
